privileged_info_summary: All metadata values have been verified against the task description and Bridge Command simulator documentation. The task requires creating three maritime training scenarios with specific environmental parameters: Scenario A (Open Water) with weather 3.0-5.0, 2 vessels; Scenario B (Coastal Pilotage) with weather ≤2.0, visibility 3.0-7.0nm, 3 vessels; Scenario C (Restricted Visibility) with weather ≤1.5, visibility 0.5-1.5nm, 3 vessels. Ship names are MV Pacific Trader, MV Dorado Star, and MV Northern Express respectively. Radar configuration targets: arpa_on=1 (ARPA enabled), full_radar=1 (maximized display), radar_range_resolution=256 (high-resolution setting), max_radar_range=72nm (matches standard marine radar specifications). STCW Table A-II/1 is a valid maritime competency standard for Officers in Charge of Navigational Watch. All paths, vessel counts, and environmental parameters are internally consistent with the Bridge Command simulator specification.
